requirement_topic.en: EMC and MCMC radio handling for cordless power tools
requirement_topic.zh: EMC与无绳电动工具的MCMC无线处理
requirement_topic.zht: EMC與無繩電動工具的MCMC無線處理

summary.en: Malaysia requires market-side handling for cordless and wire-connected tools with intentional RF transmit functions through MCMC process channels. Cordless power tools that include Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, remote control, or remote telemetry features are handled under Malaysian telecom-radio scope before or alongside ST/SIRIM filing. Corded tools without intentional transmitter functions follow the electrical safety path without MCMC registration.
summary.zh: 马来西亚对带有有意广播功能的无绳工具及带通信模块的有线工具实施MCMC处理流程。具备Wi-Fi、蓝牙、遥控或遥测功能的无绳工具应在或并行于ST/SIRIM申报前完成MCMC范围确认；不含有意发射功能的有绳工具按电气安全路径走，不进入无线器材注册通道。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞對具有意無線發射功能的無繩工具及帶通訊模組的有線工具實施MCMC處理流程。具備Wi-Fi、藍牙、遙控或遙測功能的無繩工具應在或並行於ST/SIRIM申報前完成MCMC範圍確認；不含有意發射功能的有繩工具按電氣安全路徑走，不進入無線器材註冊通道。

standards_or_laws: MCMC radio and telecommunications framework for equipment with intentional RF transmission
Malaysian spectrum-use and wireless conformity requirements for products in scope
MS IEC 62841 and MS IEC EMC technical route where applied in Malaysia

summary.en: China safety and EMC compliance usually follows GB/T electrical and EMC frameworks such as GB/T 4343.1 where applicable. China evidence is often separate between electrical safety and radio declaration, and does not automatically close Malaysia MCMC routing for cordless or smart models.
summary.zh: 中国通常按GB/T体系及相关EMC框架（如GB/T 4343.1）处理安全与EMC，证据常按电气与无线申报分开管理。对于无绳或智能化机型，该证据不能自动替代马来西亚MCMC路由要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常按GB/T體系及相關EMC框架（如GB/T 4343.1）處理安全與EMC，證據常按電氣與無線申報分開管理。對於無繩或智慧型機型，該證據不能自動替代馬來西亞MCMC路由要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 4343.1 domestic EMC framework where applicable

gap.en: The practical gap is over-inclusive versus under-scoped wireless evidence in Chinese export files. A model with no wireless function is not in scope for MCMC, while cordless models need explicit declaration, declaration owner, and evidence routing in the Malaysian file.
gap.zh: 实务差距在于中国出口文件中无线范围的过界或欠界。无无线功能的型号不应按MCMC办理；但无绳型号需要在马来西亚文件中明确申报对象、申报主体和证据链路。
gap.zht: 實務差距在於中國出口文件中無線範圍之過界或欠界。無無線功能的型號不應按MCMC辦理；但無繩型號需要在馬來西亞文件中明確申報對象、申報主體和證據鏈路。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional. MCMC filing and related radio scope is mandatory only when the power tool contains intentional transmission features. Cordless models with RF modules should be handled under MCMC channels before market entry.
mandatory_status.cn: Conditional. Chinese GB/T EMC and GB 3883 records are often relevant to technical validation but do not auto-define Malaysia MCMC scope for models with intentional RF functions.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Conditionally non-compliant for Malaysia entry when a cordless model has unresolved MCMC scope and importer-channel details. Verify every cordless SKU model and radio function before release.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于包含无线功能的无绳型号，如MCMC范围和进口方通道未清晰归档，不能视为马来西亚就绪。应在放行前逐型号核验无线功能并补齐路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於包含無線功能的無繩型號，如MCMC範圍和進口方通道未清晰歸檔，不能視為馬來西亞就緒。應在放行前逐機型核驗無線功能並補齊路徑。
